name: Juan dela Cruz
headline: Frontend engineer (3 yrs) — React, TypeScript, Tailwind
bio: Frontend developer with three years of full-time experience shipping production React applications for Cebu-based startups and one regional BPO. Currently at BlueLeaf Tech as the lead frontend voice on a small product team. Maintains a separate CV for customer-support roles based on a hybrid early career stretch at MariaSoft.

name: Maria Santos
headline: Senior frontend engineer (4 yrs) — design systems, mentoring
bio: Senior frontend engineer at Northgate BPO in Mandaue, currently tech-lead of a five-person frontend team. Drove a fifteen-month Tailwind migration across roughly two hundred screens with no break in the weekly release cadence. Looking specifically for senior roles that involve mentoring.

name: Pedro Reyes
headline: Tier-2 SaaS support specialist — trilingual, CSAT 92%+
bio: Customer-support specialist at Reefside Labs, handling roughly seventy tickets per shift for North-American small-business customers. Promoted from tier 1 to tier 2 after eleven months. Trilingual (Cebuano, English, Tagalog).

name: Anna Lim
headline: Junior frontend developer — bootcamp graduate, 2 OSS contributions
bio: Recent bootcamp graduate (2025) with one year of freelance frontend work and two merged contributions to mid-sized open-source React projects. Strong on fundamentals; explicitly looking for a structured first full-time role with senior mentorship.

name: Joaquin Bautista
headline: Bookkeeper (6 yrs) — QuickBooks, PH tax, monthly close
bio: Bookkeeper with six years of experience across two Philippine SMEs. Owns monthly close, BIR filings, and works directly with outside CPAs on year-end audit. Looking for a role close to Carcar with predictable daytime hours.

name: Rosario Villaroya
headline: Senior-high math teacher — LET-licensed, 5 yrs DepEd-aligned
bio: LET-licensed senior-high math teacher with five school years at a Talisay private school. Currently teaches Pre-Calculus and Basic Calculus across three sections plus one Grade 12 advisory. Open to lateral moves within Cebu Province.
